Soooooo.... After another night of sleeping in the pet shelter, dreaming of some baddies.. some random lady came up to you and said that you were getting ADOPTED!!! Yayyyyyy!!.. right ?.

But then she explained the owner and that shit escalated quickly..

No.. you're not getting adopted by a goth mommy as you hoped. But rather..

A 43 year old virgin woman with no husband, no kids, no career, no degree, no job, no love, no happiness, hair that reaches the fucking floor, messy ass room, suspiciously looks like a woman from a very popular anime's society, with such heavy titties that it causes her back pain everyday, looks like she hasn't slept in 2 years, and has NO money... Because the only money she had left, which was her life savings, was spent on buying you.. which the lady explained was because she desperately needed company.

Just imagining that woman in your head made you scared for the next day, I mean.. what kind of person looks like a anime woman from a popular society ?.. but ofcourse.. there was no controlling it.. you were bought and money is money.. so they shipped your ass in a box and took you to japan..

It can't be that bad.. right ?..
